data.body: ASSESSMENT (subagents, cited): only aa5a looked resolved by 2271912cc but completion-verifier caught a real residual gap (regression test injects Linux ENOENT only, not macOS EINVAL 'Invalid argument'; AC-3 wants CI-green evidence) -> NOT cleanly closeable. All 10 survive. Two PARTIAL (7a41,9d7c: core disk-reclamation landed, runbook-doc ACs unmet). SIDE TASK DONE: added worktree-switch+teardown line to /rebar-debug SKILL.md, plan-review PASS, landed for review as Gerrit 507. PIPELINE: per-bug fresh worktree off origin/main, plan-review->claim, RED->GREEN, commit(rebar-ticket+DCO+Change-Id), push gerrit refs/for/main, close after Verified+1. DONE-FOR-REVIEW: bug #4 8a37 observability.sh exit-1-on-healthy -> trailing exit 0 + hermetic PATH-shim regression test; claimed; Gerrit 508. LATER: #3 5147 sign-swallow near deliberate commit 3938c7ed2 (legitimacy check); #7 b3e5 --force is feature-ish; #8 406f grounding LLM-surface; #6 d220 Dockerfile infra-hard.
